calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-06-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection filed. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, the court ordered that this matter be dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Continued To Dec-06-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/6/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
